title: Seamless Jacket Flatlay

imagePrompts.prompt:
PHASE 1 — FORM: A relaxed linen jacket with no visible zip, buttons, or fastening of any kind — closes seamlessly

PHASE 2 — MATERIAL: soft linen surface, AURORA to the touch

PHASE 3 — LIGHTING: Soft diffused light from above, gentle shadow falloff

PHASE 4 — SETTING: soft cream studio backdrop, flat-lay editorial composition, generous negative space

Swap: relaxed linen jacket / soft linen / soft cream studio backdrop

originalPrompt:
PHASE 1 — FORM: A relaxed linen jacket with no visible zip, buttons, or fastening of any kind — closes seamlessly

PHASE 2 — MATERIAL: soft linen surface, AURORA to the touch

promptTranslations.zh:
第一阶段 — 形态：一件relaxed linen jacket，无可见拉链、纽扣或任何紧固件——闭合处浑然一体

第二阶段 — 材质：soft linen表面，触感AURORA

第三阶段 — 光影：上方柔和的漫射光，阴影过渡自然

第四阶段 — 环境：soft cream studio backdrop，平铺式编辑构图，留白充裕

替换项：relaxed linen jacket / soft linen / soft cream studio backdrop
promptTranslations.fr:
PHASE 1 — FORME : Une relaxed linen jacket sans zip, bouton ou aucune fermeture visible — se ferme sans couture

PHASE 2 — MATÉRIAU : surface soft linen, sensation AURORA

PHASE 3 — ÉCLAIRAGE : lumière douce et diffusée de dessus, ombres légères

PHASE 4 — AMBIANCE : soft cream studio backdrop, composition éditoriale en flat-lay, bel espace négatif généreux

Échange : relaxed linen jacket / soft linen / soft cream studio backdrop
promptTranslations.ru:
PHASE 1 — ФОРМА: relaxed linen jacket без видимой молнии, пуговиц или любых застёжек — закрывается бесшовно

PHASE 2 — МАТЕРИАЛ: поверхность soft linen, на ощупь AURORA

PHASE 3 — ОСВЕЩЕНИЕ: мягкий рассеянный свет сверху, плавное затенение

PHASE 4 — ОБСТАНОВКА: soft cream studio backdrop, редакционная композиция в плоской развёртке, просторное негативное пространство

Swap: relaxed linen jacket / soft linen / soft cream studio backdrop
promptTranslations.pt:
FASE 1 — FORMA: Um relaxed linen jacket sem zíper, botões ou fechamento visível de qualquer tipo — fecha-se perfeitamente

FASE 2 — MATERIAL: superfície soft linen, toque AURORA

FASE 3 — ILUMINAÇÃO: luz suave e difusa de cima, queda suave de sombra

FASE 4 — AMBIENTE: soft cream studio backdrop, composição editorial flat-lay, amplo espaço negativo

Permuta: relaxed linen jacket / soft linen / soft cream studio backdrop
promptTranslations.ja:
フェーズ1 — 形状: ジッパーやボタンなどの留め具が一切見えないrelaxed linen jacket（シームレスな仕上がり）

フェーズ2 — 素材: soft linenの表面、触り心地の良いAURORA

フェーズ3 — ライティング: 上部からの柔らかな拡散光、穏やかな影の落ち込み

フェーズ4 — セッティング: soft cream studio backdrop、エディトリアルなフラットレイ構図、余白を活かした配置

入れ替え項目: relaxed linen jacket / soft linen / soft cream studio backdrop
promptTranslations.ko:
PHASE 1 — 형태: 지퍼, 단추, 잠금장치가 전혀 보이지 않는 relaxed linen jacket — 이음새 없이 매끄럽게 닫힌 형태

PHASE 2 — 소재: soft linen 표면, 만졌을 때 느껴지는 AURORA 질감

PHASE 3 — 조명: 위에서 내려오는 부드러운 확산광, 은은한 그림자

PHASE 4 — 배경: soft cream studio backdrop, 플랫레이 에디토리얼 구도, 여백의 미를 살린 구성

교체 항목: relaxed linen jacket / soft linen / soft cream studio backdrop
